title: Cernohorskya bourgaeana
intro: Cernohorskya bourgaeana, also known as Bourgaea, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to relieve congestion and coughs. The bioactive constituents of Cernohorskya bourgaeana include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in the form of tinctures and syrups to treat respiratory complaints and other health conditions.

The classification of Cernohorskya bourgaeana is based on its morphological characteristics, including its leaf shape and flower structure. Cernohorskya bourgaeana is a rare and endangered plant species.
